comments.text: Some small updates on lower bounds: 1. Lichtman (arXiv:2211.09641v1), Corollary 1.2, improves Harman [Ha08] by proving that $C(x) > x^{0.3389}$ for large $x$. 2. Li (arXiv:2308.04458v8), Theorem 10, claims a slightly stronger exponent $C(x) > x^{0.34}$, though I have not verified the details of this preprint. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
Thanks. I have added Licthman's exponent, but I believe there is some doubt over the work of Li you mention, and hence I'll leave this out until this has been independently verified.
